steps.title: Prologue
lines: 2439. The empire is still standing, but Beiyao already sounds hollow from the inside.
Indels returns to a city where command, faith, and fear have fused into the same iron shell.
This demo begins at the edge of a political fracture, before the full revolution takes shape.

steps.title: Beiyao Gate
steps.description: Inspect the immediate surroundings before moving deeper into the city.

options.label: Inspect the watchtower
options.result: The watchtower banners still hang straight. The soldiers beneath them do not.

options.label: Observe the crowd
options.result: No one speaks above a whisper. Even panic here has discipline.

options.label: Read the posted order
options.result: The decree promises stability. Every line beneath it smells of emergency rule.

steps.title: First Friction
lines: A local patrol moves to stop you before questions can become trouble.
This fight introduces the core loop: basic attacks are stable, spirit skills are stronger, and spirit mismanagement can kill you from either end.

steps.title: Approach
lines: The patrol falls, but the city does not loosen.
Every corridor ahead feels less like a route and more like a sentence already written.
At the center of Beiyao, Solomon Beiyao is waiting.

steps.title: After The Blade
lines: The assassination lands, but the structure around it does not collapse.
If anything, Beiyao now feels more truthful: power wounded, not broken.
This is the end of the first vertical slice. The next step is to turn this scaffold into a sharper chapter with final writing, presentation, and systems.
